accessControl.allowGuestAccessDesc: When disabled, only the server owner can log in to Tracearr
accessControl.primaryAuthMethodDesc: Choose which authentication method is shown by default on the login page
accessControl.singleOwnerNote: Note: When guest access is disabled, only the server owner can sign in. All other users will see an "Access Denied" message.
accessControl.title: Access Control

backup.databaseSize: Tamaño actual de la base de datos: {{size}}
backup.deleteConfirmDescription: ¿Está seguro que desea eliminar esta copia de seguridad? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
backup.description: Backup and restore your Tracearr data
backup.freeSpace: Espacio libre del directorio de copia de seguridad: {{size}}
backup.lowDiskSpace: Espacio en disco bajo: las copias de seguridad y las restauraciones requieren al menos el doble del tamaño de la base de datos en espacio libre.
backup.noBackups: Aún no hay copias de seguridad. Crea tu primera copia de seguridad.

restore.cannotRestore: La restauración requiere privilegios de superusuario de PostgreSQL. Por favor, asegúrese de que el usuario de la base de datos tiene privilegios de superusuario e inténtelo de nuevo.
restore.complete: Restauración completada con éxito. La página se actualizará pronto.
restore.confirmLabel: Entiendo que esto reemplazará a todos los datos
restore.databaseSize: Tamaño de la Base de Datos
restore.pgVersionMismatch: La copia de seguridad fue creada en PostgreSQL {{backupVersion}}, pero este servidor ejecuta PostgreSQL {{serverVersion}}. Restaurar un volcado desde una versión más reciente de PostgreSQL no es compatible.
restore.title: Restaurar copia de seguridad
restore.tsVersionMismatch: La copia de seguridad se creó con TimescaleDB {{backupVersion}}, pero este servidor sólo soporta TimescaleDB {{serverVersion}}.
restore.warning: Restaurar reemplazará todos los datos existentes. Necesitará volver a iniciar sesión después de que la restauración se complete.

backup.scheduleDayOfMonthHint: En meses con menos días, la copia de seguridad se ejecuta el último día.
backup.title: Copia de seguridad

toast.backupCreateFailed: Error al crear copia de seguridad
toast.backupCreated: Copia de seguridad creada con éxito
toast.backupDeleteFailed: Error al eliminar copia de seguridad
toast.backupUploadFailed: Error al subir la copia de seguridad
toast.backupUploaded: Copia de seguridad creada con éxito

general.apiKeyDesc: Access the Tracearr API for third-party integrations like Homarr, Home Assistant, etc.
general.apiKeyReadAccess: Your API key grants full read access to your Tracearr data.
general.appearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of Tracearr
general.cyanDefault: * Cyan is the default accent color
general.enhancedGeoIPDesc: Use Plex's GeoIP service for more accurate location data. When enabled, IP addresses are sent to plex.tv for lookup. Local MaxMind database is used as fallback.
general.externalAccessDesc: Configure how external devices (like mobile apps) connect to your server
general.externalUrlDesc: The URL that external devices should use to reach this server. Used for QR codes and mobile app pairing.
general.generateApiKeyPrompt: Generate an API key to enable external integrations.
general.iosHttpWarning: iOS requires HTTPS for external connections. Set up a reverse proxy with SSL.
general.jellyfinPollingNote: Jellyfin/Emby are polled at the interval above.
general.languageDescription: Elige tu idioma de visualización preferido.
general.localhostWarning: Localhost URLs won't work for external devices. Use your LAN IP or a domain name.
general.plexSseNote: Plex uses Server-Sent Events (SSE) for near-instant updates — no polling needed.
general.regenerateApiKeyDesc: This will invalidate your current API key. Any integrations using the old key will stop working.
general.sessionSyncDesc: Enable session tracking for your media servers
general.timeFormatDescription: Elige cómo se muestran las horas.
general.title: Ajustes Generales
general.unitSystemDesc: Choose how distances and speeds are displayed

import.apiKeyHelp: Found in Tautulli Settings → Web Interface → API Key.
import.connectedFound: Connected! Found {{users}} users and {{records}} history records.
import.enrichMetadataHelp: Fetches additional metadata from your media server for imported sessions.
import.exportBackupHelp: In Jellystat, go to Settings → Backup → Activity Backup to export your data.
import.exportBackupHint: Export an Activity Backup from Jellystat
import.howItWorksDesc: Tracearr will import all historical watch data from your source. This may take a while depending on the size of your library.
import.importHistoryDesc: Import historical watch data from external sources
import.includeStreamDetails: Include detailed stream data (codecs, bitrate, resolution)
import.includeStreamDetailsHelp: Imports additional stream information. May increase import time significantly.
import.noServersHint: You need at least one connected server to import data.
import.overwriteFriendlyNames: Overwrite existing friendly names with Tautulli names
import.overwriteFriendlyNamesHelp: Existing identity names in Tracearr will be replaced with the friendly names from Tautulli.
import.pleaseEnterDetails: Please enter Tautulli URL and API key
import.selectJellyfinServer: Select a Jellyfin or Emby server
import.skipDuplicate: Duplicate session — The session was already imported previously.
import.skipInProgress: In-progress session — Active/incomplete sessions without a reference ID are skipped.
import.skipSyncHint: If many records are skipped, ensure you've synced your server recently in Settings → Servers.
import.skipUserNotFoundJellyfin: User not found — The Jellyfin/Emby user doesn't exist in Tracearr. Sync your server first to add all users.
import.skipUserNotFoundPlex: User not found — The Plex user doesn't exist in Tracearr. Sync your server first to add all users.
import.tautulliUrlHelp: The URL of your Tautulli instance.
import.title: Importar datos
import.updateExistingRecords: Update existing records with stream details
import.updateExistingRecordsHelp: Previously imported records will be updated with stream quality data.

ipWarning.message: Todos los usuarios parecen estar usando la misma dirección IP o IPs de red local. Esto puede afectar a las reglas basadas en ubicación o dirección IP.

jobs.description: Manage background tasks that keep your data accurate and optimized.
jobs.mayTakeAWhileDesc: This job may take several minutes to complete depending on the size of your library.
jobs.title: Maintenance Jobs

mobile.disableMobileAccessConfirm: This will disconnect all mobile devices and revoke all sessions. You can re-enable mobile access later.
mobile.externalUrlBanner: Using a reverse proxy or accessing remotely? Set your
mobile.externalUrlBannerSuffix: so the mobile app can connect to your server.
mobile.externalUrlRequired: An external URL must be configured in General Settings for mobile pairing to work.
mobile.getTheAppDesc: Download the Tracearr mobile app for iOS or Android
mobile.mobileAccessDisabledDesc: Enable mobile access to allow the Tracearr mobile app to connect to your server.
mobile.pairNewDeviceDesc: Scan the QR code with the Tracearr mobile app, or enter the token manually.
mobile.pairYourDeviceDesc: Scan the QR code with the Tracearr app to connect this server.
mobile.removeDeviceConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{deviceName}}? This device will need to pair again to reconnect.
mobile.renameDeviceDesc: Enter a name to identify this device in the list.
mobile.revokeAllConfirm: This will disconnect all mobile devices. They will need to pair again to reconnect.
mobile.title: App Móvil
mobile.tokenExpiryNote: This token expires in 5 minutes and can only be used once.

routing.webNote: Push notifications are configured per-device in the mobile app.
routing.webToastNote: shows toast notifications in this browser.

plex.chooseServer: Elige qué Plex Media Server quieres monitorizar

servers.addServerDialogDescOther: Connect a Jellyfin or Emby server.
servers.addServerDialogDescPlex: Select a Plex server from your linked account.
servers.allServersConnectedDesc: All servers from this account are already connected.
servers.apiKeyHelp: Found in your media server's dashboard under API Keys or Advanced settings.
servers.apiKeyHelpEmby: Find this in Emby Server → API Keys
servers.apiKeyHelpJellyfin: Find this in Jellyfin Dashboard → API Keys
servers.description: Manage your connected Plex, Jellyfin, and Emby servers
servers.editServerDesc: Update the server name or connection URL.
servers.noPlexAccountsLinkedHint: Link a Plex account above, then come back to add a server.
servers.noServersConnectedHint: Click "Add Server" to connect a Jellyfin or Emby server
servers.removeServerConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this server? All associated session data will be retained, but you won't be able to monitor new sessions from this server.
servers.selectAccountHelp: Select which Plex account to discover servers from.
servers.serverColorDesc: Used for visual attribution in multi-server view
servers.serverUrlHelp: Direct URL to your Jellyfin or Emby server. Use IP:port for best reliability.
servers.serverUrlHelpEmby: The URL where your Emby server is accessible
servers.serverUrlHelpJellyfin: The URL where your Jellyfin server is accessible
servers.title: Servidores conectados
servers.updateHint: Or click Update below to save only the name change.

tailscale.connected: Tailscale conectado. Tu instancia de Tracearr está disponible en la tailnet.
tailscale.description: Accede a Tracearr de forma segura en tu red Tailscale sin necesidad de abrir puertos.
tailscale.disableConfirmDescription: Esto desconectará Tracearr de tu tailnet. Puedes volver a activarlo sin necesidad de re-autorizar.
tailscale.disabledDescription: Activa Tailscale para añadir Tracearr a tu tailnet privada. Sin necesidad de abrir puertos ni configurar proxy inverso.
tailscale.hostnameHint: Nombre personalizado opcional para este dispositivo en tu tailnet. Solo letras, números y guiones.
tailscale.notAvailable: Binario de Tailscale no encontrado. Esta función solo está disponible con la imagen Docker oficial.
tailscale.resetConfirmDescription: Esto desconectará Tracearr de tu tailnet y eliminará la identidad del dispositivo. Tendrás que reautorizar si vuelves a activarlo.
tailscale.title: Tailscale VPN

toast.exitNodeFailed: Error al configurar el nodo de salida

tailscale.unknownError: Se ha producido un error desconocido.
